transcriptions:
The first words spoken in the original "Phonograph" recording, transcribed into written format, are:

"The first words I spoke in the original Phonograph,
a little piece of practical poetry.
Mary had a little lamb,
it squeaked as white as snow,
and everywhere that Mary went,
the lamb was sure to go."

The content of the input audio is 'the first words i spoke in the original corner graph a little piece of practical poetry mary had a little lamb its fleece was white as snow and everywhere that mary went the lamb was sure to go'.
The first words I spoke in the original chorograph, a little piece of practical poetry. Mary had a little lamb, its fleece was white as snow, and everywhere that Mary went, the lamb was sure to go.
